embeds.title: Alter
embeds.description:
`                                                                     `
Those who manifest this tattoo are among the most varied and versatile, able to alter their physical forms to best suit their partners’ preferences. While not as complete a transformation as a changeling or wildshape, this tattoo allows you to alter specific body parts as if affected by the Alter Self or Enlarge/Reduce spells for the duration of a lewd encounter. embeds.title: Bare

Most eventually stop trying to wear clothes entirely, simply embracing their forced nudity.
